branch.frontier_task_title: v6.7 release closure: ship Verifiable Governance
branch.branch_summary: Close TASK-076 v6.7.0 release: refresh release docs/manifests to 6.7.0, run release-state-audit with integrated Archmap impact, review provenance, and evidence independence gates, run full tests/smoke/help/organization verification, and prepare tag/release notes. Stop condition: release closure only; no new governance audit families. QIF boundary: v6.7 release readiness is structural/runtime governance evidence, not proof of semantic product quality.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-076 sits on v6.7 after shipped v6.6.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Advance v6.7 Verifiable Governance: make missing archmap impact dispositions, self-attested review provenance, and low-independence evidence machine-detectable so release sign-off can fail on structural self-attestation instead of trusting maker claims.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-076: v6.7 release closure: ship Verifiable Governance
